en: Now, next, I followed your bus driver. Newsflash. He really does have a broken neck.
ko: 뉴스 플래시, 그는 정말로 목이 부러졌어.

en: Fantastic. That makes my life much easier. Keep it coming.
ko: 그 덕분에 내 일이 훨씬 쉬워졌어. 계속해.

en: Second-story guy out of Indianapolis, Lasky. Did a diamond Menard.
Now, if you're looking for a talent who'll keep his mouth shut, you can trust him.
ko: 만약 입을 다물고 있는 인재를 찾고 있다면,

en: I say he's worth keeping an eye on. Second-story guy, second-story guy.
ko: 나는 그를 주목할 가치가 있다고 말해.

en: Yeah, I got more second-story guys in my book than pimples at a junior prom.
ko: 응, 내 목록에는 주니어 춤 파티의 여드름보다 더 많은 2층 집 강도가 있어.

en: High school chemistry teacher. You're shitting me, really?
Walter Hartwell White. Chemistry teacher over at J.P. Wynn.
Working with a former student, current meth head, one Jesse Pinkman.
Wow. What else about the teacher?
Jesus. That's why he can't quit with a coffee. How bad?
